meaning: n.合计,总计,集合体adj.合计的,集合的,聚合的v.聚集,集合,合计
examples: The surface of poured concrete may vary according to its finish and aggregate.
The rate of growth of GNP will depend upon the rate of growth of aggregate demand.
And I would emphasize that the size of the aggregate demand problem is massive.
But Mark Russell from the British Marine Aggregate Producers' Association said research disproved these claims.
